prose.rule: There is a hard, clear threshold between the REAL world and the DIGITAL world (the agentverse), and the two are never confusable. REAL = solid, warm gold-lit, casts a SHADOW (humans, desks, the physical room). DIGITAL = translucent holographic ANTHROPIC clay-coral orange (~#D97757), glowing, casts LIGHT not shadow (agents, the inside of the computer). A clear threshold line separates them in every frame that shows both.
prose.source: Locked with Gary 2026-07-16 while building the Chief of Agents.
prose.appliesTo: every frame depicting agents and/or the digital world
